agent.name: Kip Assistant
agent.welcomeMessage:
Hello 👋 I'm Kip!
How can I help you today?

quickReplies.label: 🍳 Find Kitchen Gadgets
quickReplies.response: I'd love to help! Check out our Kitchen Gadgets section — we have choppers, air fryers, instant pots and more. Head to our Kitchen page for the full collection!

quickReplies.label: 🏠 Browse Smart Home Devices
quickReplies.response: Great choice! Our Smart Home section features top-rated devices including smart displays, robot vacuums, LED strips and more. Visit the Smart Home page to explore!

quickReplies.label: 🔥 Trending Products
quickReplies.response: Here are our hottest picks right now: Smart Air Fryer XL, Ninja Blender Pro, and the Robot Vacuum S8. All available with fast Amazon delivery!

quickReplies.label: ⭐ Product Recommendations
quickReplies.response: I'd love to recommend the perfect gadget for you! Are you looking for something for the kitchen or your home? We also have amazing deals going on right now!

autoReplies.response: Great! Head to our Kitchen Gadgets page to discover amazing tools that'll transform your cooking! 🍳
Smart home is our specialty! Check out the Smart Home page for our top-rated devices. 🏠
Looking for savings? Visit our Best Deals page — we update it daily with flash discounts! 🔥
We have in-depth reviews and guides on our Blog. Perfect for research before buying! 📝
Hey there! 👋 Welcome to Kip Smart Living! How can I help you find the perfect gadget today?
We have gadgets for every budget — from under $15 to premium picks. Check our Deals page for the biggest savings right now! 💰
Most products are Amazon Prime eligible — that means fast, FREE delivery in 1-2 days! 🚀 Click any product to check shipping details on Amazon.
All products link directly to Amazon, which has a great return policy — most items can be returned within 30 days hassle-free. Check each product page for specific details.
Looking for a gift? 🎁 Our top gift ideas are on the Kitchen page and Smart Home page. All ship with Amazon Prime!
Great question! Yes, we earn a small commission on Amazon purchases at no extra cost to you. This helps us keep the site running and all our reviews free. 💙
Need to speak to a person? You can reach our team at hello@kipsmartliving.com — we typically respond within 24 hours! 📧
Kip Smart Living Enterprise is a product discovery platform helping people find the best kitchen gadgets and smart home devices. Our team tests and reviews hundreds of products each month! ⚡

fallbackResponses: Thanks for your message! 😊 I'm here to help you find the perfect gadget. Try asking about kitchen tools, smart home devices, or current deals!
Hmm, I'm not sure about that one! Try browsing our Kitchen or Smart Home pages — you might find exactly what you're looking for!
I may not have that answer right now, but our Blog has tons of buying guides and reviews that might help! 📝

proactiveMessages.message: 👋 Looking for something specific? I can help you find the perfect gadget!
🔥 We have flash deals running today — want me to show you the best ones?
